title: Lift Off
editorialSummary: Rocket launch vehicle families grouped by origin nation. False trail: Ariane and Vega are both ESA European rockets but belong to different families by series; Atlas and Delta are both US but belong to separate lineage families. Groups are by rocket family lineage, not country alone.

meta.gptRationale: Rocket-family grouping is fairly specialized, and several items require aerospace knowledge to separate agencies and launch families cleanly.
